description:
Perform a comparative safety analysis for a Renal Cell Carcinoma (RCC) patient requiring anticoagulation. Using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app, identify the drug-drug interaction traffic light colors (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, or Grey) for Sunitinib and Pazopanib when paired with Warfarin and Apixaban. Create a summary matrix at /sdcard/rcc_anticoagulant_matrix.txt in the following format:

Sunitinib + Warfarin: [Color]
Sunitinib + Apixaban: [Color]
Pazopanib + Warfarin: [Color]
Pazopanib + Apixaban: [Color]
